senses.gloss: active participle of ظَلَمَ (ẓalama); unjust; tyrannical, oppressing, iniquitous

examples.text: وَدَخَلَ جَنَّتَهُ وَهُوَ ظَالِمٌ لِّنَفْسِهِ قَالَ مَا أَظُنُّ أَن تَبِيدَ هَٰذِهِ أَبَدًا
examples.english: And he entered his garden while he was unjust to himself. He said, "I do not think that this will perish - ever.

etymology.text: Derived from the active participle of ظَلَمَ (ẓalama).
